commit.message:
Only run 2016 benchmarks

Only run the benchmarks for 2016 to limit the duration.

Add continuous benchmarks (#1818)

Add GitHub Actions workflow to run continuous benchmarks and publish to a tracking website.

Bump eslint from 9.8.0 to 9.9.0 in /src/AdventOfCode.Site (#1819)

Bumps [eslint](https://github.com/eslint/eslint) from 9.8.0 to 9.9.0.

updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: eslint
  dependency-type: direct:development
  update-type: version-update:semver-minor
...
